upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ye te haveBirvi paRI~ radASan' (f0 7199) pustake paWitamapyarTanirdeSAyehAnUdyate DanAni viSezeRAdApayan ityarTaH dASatirihAntarRItaRyarTakaH
'yo no agne dureva A marto vaDAya dASati' (f0 61631)
'maGErmaGono prati SUra dASasi' (f0 8242) maGono maGavato Danavato'tikramyAsmaByaM dadAsItyAha
